examples: Please fill out this application form.
He filled out as he got older.
He filled out the tax return yesterday.
The puppy is filling out nicely.
Don't worry, you'll fill out eventually.
She filled out the questionnaire online.
You need to fill out all the fields.
She filled out after having children.
He's filled out since I last saw him.
Fill out the form in block letters.
example_translate: Не волнуйся, ты ещё наберёшь вес.
Он пополнел с тех пор, как я его видел.
fill out.synonyms:
Заполнять (форму, документ) - complete, fill in, fill up
Полнеть, набирать вес - gain weight, put on weight
